topics.title: Mitochondria Facts That Will Blow Your Mind
topics.script:
Bhai sun, mitochondria ko powerhouse of the cell bolte hain, par kya tu jaanta hai kyun?
Yeh chhote se organelles ATP banate hain jo basically cellular money hai.
Bina mitochondria ke tu hil bhi nahi sakta, soch bhi nahi sakta, bc saans bhi nahi le sakta.
Aur sabse crazy baat? Mitochondria ka apna DNA hota hai, bilkul alag tere baaki cells se.
Scientists kehte hain yeh actually bacteria the jo humari cells mein ghus gaye billions of years pehle.
Haan bhai, tere andar aliens hain basically, maa kasam.

topics.title: Black Holes - Space Ka Sabse Scary Secret
topics.script:
Bhai black holes itne dense hote hain ki light bhi escape nahi kar sakti.
Ek teaspoon black hole material ka weight Mount Everest se zyada hoga, samjha?
Agar tu black hole ke paas jayega na, toh spaghettification hoga - matlab tu noodle ban jayega bc.
Time bhi slow ho jata hai black hole ke paas. Tere liye 1 minute, bahar walo ke liye centuries nikal jayengi.
Aur sun, humari Milky Way ke center mein ek supermassive black hole hai - Sagittarius A star.
Woh 4 million times heavier hai sun se. Haan bhai, 4 million suns ek jagah, maa kasam.

topics.title: DNA Facts Jo Tera Dimag Ghuma Denge
topics.script:
Bhai sun, tere andar 37 trillion cells hain aur har ek mein 6 feet DNA hai.
Agar tu apna saara DNA stretch kare na, toh woh sun tak 600 baar ja sakta hai.
Tera DNA 99.9% same hai har insaan se. Bas 0.1% difference hai tu aur Shah Rukh Khan mein.
DNA mein 3 billion letters hain. Agar tu 1 letter per second padhe, toh 95 saal lagenge bc.
Aur sabse wild baat? Tu 50% banana ke saath DNA share karta hai.
Haan bhai, tu technically aadha kela hai, maa kasam.

topics.title: Human Brain - Duniya Ka Sabse Powerful Computer
topics.script:
Tere brain mein 86 billion neurons hain, har ek 10,000 connections ke saath.
Brain sirf 2% body weight hai par 20% energy use karta hai, saala greedy hai.
Tera brain 1 second mein 11 million bits information process karta hai, par tu sirf 40 consciously samajh pata hai bc.
Brain mein pain receptors nahi hote. Matlab brain surgery mein patient jaag sakta hai, no joke.
Aur sun, tere brain ki storage capacity 2.5 petabytes hai - 3 million hours video fit ho sakti hai.
Haan bhai, Netflix ki poori library tera brain handle kar sakta hai, maa kasam.

topics.title: Ocean Secrets Jo Koi Nahi Jaanta
topics.script:
Bhai samundar itna deep hai ki humne sirf 5% explore kiya hai abhi tak.
Mariana Trench itni deep hai ki agar Mount Everest wahan daale toh bhi 1 mile paani upar hoga.
Ocean mein itna gold hai ki har insaan ko 9 pounds mil sakta hai, par nikalna impossible hai bc.
Deep sea mein aisi creatures hain jo apni light khud banati hain - bioluminescence.
95% ocean abhi bhi unexplored hai. Aliens dhundhne space jaate hain, apna ocean dekho pehle saale.
Haan bhai, humein apne planet ke baare mein Mars se kam pata hai, maa kasam.

topics.title: Quantum Physics - Reality Ka Mind F**k
topics.script:
Quantum physics mein particles do jagah ek saath ho sakte hain, haan bhai seriously.
Jab tu kisi particle ko observe karta hai, woh behave change kar deta hai. Creepy af.
Quantum entanglement mein do particles connected rehte hain chahe kitni bhi door ho - Einstein ne ise spooky action bola.
Schrodinger ki billi alive aur dead dono hai jab tak tu box nahi kholta bc.
Atoms mostly empty space hain. Agar saari empty space nikaal de toh poori humanity ek sugar cube mein fit ho jayegi.
Haan bhai, tu basically 99.9999% nothing hai, maa kasam.

topics.title: Evolution Facts Jo Schools Nahi Sikhate
topics.script:
Bhai tere body mein vestigial organs hain jo ab useless hain - appendix, wisdom teeth, tailbone.
Humans ke ancestors fish the - isliye tujhe hiccups aate hain, fish ke gill breathing mechanism se.
Teri goosebumps isliye aati hain kyunki tere ancestors ke baal the jo threat pe khade ho jaate the.
Humans technically great apes category mein aate hain - tu basically fancy bandar hai bc.
98.8% DNA chimpanzees se match karta hai. Sirf 1.2% difference hai tu aur zoo ke chimp mein.
Haan bhai, evolution ne tujhe banana se human banaya, maa kasam.

topics.title: Universe Kitna Bada Hai - Mind Blown
topics.script:
Observable universe mein 2 trillion galaxies hain, har ek mein billions of stars.
Light ko sun se earth tak aane mein 8 minutes lagte hain - tu 8 minute purana sun dekhta hai bc.
Nearest star Proxima Centauri 4.24 light years door hai - fastest rocket se 73,000 saal lagenge.
Universe 93 billion light years wide hai aur constantly expand ho raha hai.
Aur sabse scary? Universe mein tera existence itna chhota hai ki mathematically tu exist hi nahi karta.
Haan bhai, cosmic scale pe tu literally nothing hai, maa kasam.
